DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
J.P. Schreiber, Esq. of Ogletree Deakins, Tel: 415.536.3404, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearances.

RULING: There being no objection, the court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant SUSQUEHANA RADIO CORP.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
